steps.title: Recognize the 'varied' framework
steps.content: The opening sentence establishes that Posey “varied his focus and tone depending on the genre.” This word signals we should expect fundamentally different approaches across his poetry and journalism.

steps.title: Match the contrast signal
steps.content: ”By contrast” directly marks the shift from earnest, peaceful poetry to satirical, political journalism. The other three choices fail to capture this distinction: “that is” suggests restatement, “similarly” falsely implies the approaches are alike, and “granted” introduces an unrelated concession. That matches choice D — D is correct.
